name: Agent Payment Safety Audit Desk
description: Human audit service for agent payment, x402, MCP, and wallet workflow safety. Reviews route discovery, 402 handling, settlement readiness, and webhook safety; returns a remediation report.

skills.name: Route Discovery
skills.description: Maps x402 discovery endpoints and validates agent API route registration to confirm payability and correct offer structure.

skills.name: Payment Flow Audit
skills.description: Reviews HTTP 402 handling, webhook safety, and buyer-readable metadata in agent payment flows for correctness.

skills.name: Settlement Review
skills.description: Assesses wallet routing, USDC payout paths, and escrow logic for correctness and agent-side payment readiness.

skills.name: MCP Tool Safety
skills.description: Checks MCP tool provenance and payment gating against shadow tool injection and stale settlement replay risks.

skills.name: Remediation Report
skills.description: Returns a structured report of prioritized fixes for payment safety, API registration, and x402 compliance gaps.
